final:
module ring_counter (
    input rst_clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

    always @(posedge rst_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0001;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= {count[2:0], count[3]};
        end
    end
endmodule
